resultList.dtldesc: Find a wonderful investment option with this lovely 2 BHK flat for sale in the busy locality of West Mambalam, Chennai. With a rental income of Rs. 20,000 at present, the property is ideal for families or investors who are on the lookout for a contemporary living option in a highly connected location.Property SpecificationsThis large flat provides a super area of 1100 sq ft and a carpet area of 970 sqft, on the 2nd floor of a well-maintained 2-story building. The flat is semi-furnished, with basic amenities like lights and fans in all rooms and wardrobes in both bedrooms. Vaastu-compliant in design, the flat has a North-facing direction, providing a positive and harmonious ambience.The design features two cozy bedrooms and two bathrooms, one of which is en-suite to the master bedroom and is tastefully designed in modern Western fashion, and the other being a shared Indian-style bathroomboth having geysers installed for added convenience.Appreciate the open air from the balcony which belongs to one of the bedrooms. The apartment boasts a living and dining room that is separate, making it spacious enough for family gatherings, and the standard kitchen works and is waiting to be tried out for cooking exploits. The stylish marble flooring in the entire apartment adds an element of class to the living area.FacilitiesThis house features basic amenities to upgrade your lifestyle. Have plenty of open car parking space for your vehicle, making it convenient and easy to access. The property enjoys 24-hour water supply, from both borewell and corporation facilities, making life easy.LocalityLocated close to Shri B S Mootha Girls Senior Secondary School and Duraiswamy Subway, this flat is strategically located with close proximity to necessary facilities. Schools, hospitals, and shopping mallssupermarkets are within a 1-2 km distance, offering everything you need to live comfortably on a daily basis.Public transport is readily available with regular buses and auto-rickshaws. Banks and ATMs too are within walking distance for your convenience. The railway station is only 1-2 km away, and the popular T Nagar Pondy Bazar is also walkable, with shopping and recreation at your fingertips.
